name: diversiotech
description: Claude Code plugins curated by Diversio (internal/team-focused tools).

plugins.name: code-review-digest-writer
plugins.description: Generates weekly code review digest docs from PR review comments for any GitHub repo.

plugins.name: monolith-review-orchestrator
plugins.description: Monolith-local PR review harness for the Diversio monolith: deep PR understanding, thread-aware GitHub review acquisition, deterministic worktree reuse/bootstrap, persistent review context across passes, resolved-comment-aware reassessment, backend monty-review handoff, and author-guiding review output.

plugins.name: monty-code-review
plugins.description: Hyper-pedantic Django4Lyfe backend code review Skill with correctness-first, harness-aware findings (Monty's taste), a pytest test-hardening lane, and persistent JSON-first review memory across review passes.

plugins.name: backend-pr-workflow
plugins.description: Diversio backend PR workflow plugin that follows repo-local PR docs, GitHub issue linkage, safe migrations, and downtime-safe schema changes.

plugins.name: backend-atomic-commit
plugins.description: Pedantic backend pre-commit and atomic-commit Skill with an iterative convergence protocol (budgets + stuck detection), enforcing AGENTS.md, repo-local docs, pre-commit hooks, .security/* helpers, and repo-local commit hygiene without AI signatures.

plugins.name: bruno-api
plugins.description: Comprehensive API documentation generator from Bruno (.bru) files that maps endpoints to Django4Lyfe implementations (DRF/Django Ninja).

plugins.name: plan-directory
plugins.description: Create and maintain structured plan directories with a master PLAN.md index, numbered task files, and required fresh-eyes validation. Includes backend-ralph-plan for RALPH loop execution.

plugins.name: pr-description-writer
plugins.description: Generates comprehensive, reviewer-friendly PR descriptions with diagrams, structured sections, and repo-local workflow context.

plugins.name: process-code-review
plugins.description: Process code review findings - interactively fix or skip issues from monty-code-review output with status tracking.

plugins.name: mixpanel-analytics
plugins.description: MixPanel analytics tracking implementation and review Skill for Django4Lyfe optimo_analytics module with PII protection and pattern enforcement.

plugins.name: clickup-ticket
plugins.description: Fetch, filter, and create ClickUp tickets directly from Claude Code or Codex. Read tickets by ID, powerful filtering (status, assignee, tags, dates), view assigned tickets, multi-org workspaces, subtasks, and intelligent caching.

plugins.name: github-ticket
plugins.description: Create, route, and inspect GitHub issues with gh CLI-backed defaults for DiversioTeam/monolith, repo-local execution repos, and project-board hydration.

plugins.name: repo-docs
plugins.description: Generate and canonicalize repository harness docs: short AGENTS.md maps, repo-local docs, quality-gate guidance, and minimal CLAUDE.md stubs.

plugins.name: visual-explainer
plugins.description: Generate presentation-ready HTML explainers for plans, diffs, diagrams, audits, and stakeholder updates with interactive intake, explicit fact-vs-inference separation, and optional Netlify preview publishing.

plugins.name: dependabot-remediation
plugins.description: Unified backend/frontend Dependabot remediation workflow with dependabot.yml review/scaffold, alert deduplication, wave planning, execution guardrails, and post-merge closure verification.

plugins.name: backend-release
plugins.description: Manages the full release workflow for Django4Lyfe backend - creating release PRs, version bumping (YYYY.MM.DD), conflict resolution, GitHub releases, and post-release branch sync.

plugins.name: terraform
plugins.description: Terraform/Terragrunt workflow tools: atomic-commit quality gates and PR workflow checks.

plugins.name: login-cta-attribution-skill
plugins.description: CTA login attribution implementation Skill for Django4Lyfe: guides adding new CTA sources, button/tab attribution, and enum registration.
